en.name: VPO-209 "Paradox Unleashed"
en.description: Originally sold as a civilian workaround rifle, the VPO-209 used a paradox-bore barrel and .366 TKM ammunition to skirt Russian firearm laws. That didn't interest Tony much — what did was the AKM backbone hiding underneath. After some time in his workshop the rifle came back very different. The trigger group has been rebuilt, the gas system opened up, and the action modified to run fully automatic. It's loud, violent, and burns through .366 like it has something to prove. Tony calls it an experiment. Most people just call it excessive.
